name: BlueHammer - Suspicious Cloud Files API Load from Non-Standard Provider
description: Detects cldapi.dll being loaded by a process that is not a known legitimate cloud-sync provider. CfRegisterSyncRoot allows arbitrary user-mode code to intercept file-system I/O in Defender's scan path. Any non-vendor process loading cldapi.dll is a high-confidence pre-exploitation indicator for T1211 scanner-freeze techniques (BlueHammer, RedSun).
query: library where dll.name : "cldapi.dll" and not process.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Dropbox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Dropbox\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Box\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: BlueHammer - KTM Transacted File API Loaded by Non-Installer Process
description: Detects ktmw32.dll being loaded by a process that is not a known Transactional NTFS user (Windows Installer, DISM, CBS, TrustedInstaller). CreateFileTransactedW combined with RollbackTransaction is the TOCTOU-race pattern used by BlueHammer phase 3 to open AV definition files inside a VSS snapshot while the scanner is frozen. No known legitimate user-space application loads ktmw32.dll outside of the Windows servicing stack.
query: library where dll.name : "ktmw32.dll" and not process.name : ("msiexec.exe", "dism.exe", "TiWorker.exe", "TrustedInstaller.exe", "wusa.exe", "expand.exe", "sfc.exe", "dfrgui.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: BlueHammer - Cloud Files and KTM Both Loaded in Same Process (High-Confidence Chain)
description: Sequence rule: fires when the same process loads cldapi.dll and then ktmw32.dll within 5 minutes. No legitimate software combines Cloud Files sync-root registration (cldapi.dll) with Kernel Transaction Manager file access (ktmw32.dll). This combination is the multi-stage behavioral fingerprint of the BlueHammer technique chain (T1211 scanner-freeze via Cloud Files + T1211 TOCTOU via KTM). Alert with highest priority on first occurrence per host.
query:
sequence by process.entity_id with maxspan=5m
  [library where dll.name : "cldapi.dll" and not process.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")]
  [library where dll.name : "ktmw32.dll" and not process.name : ("msiexec.exe", "dism.exe", "TiWorker.exe", "TrustedInstaller.exe")]
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: BlueHammer - EICAR Drop Followed by cmd.exe Directory Enumeration from Same Parent
description: Detects the specific Cloud Files freeze-probe pattern: a process drops a file matching the EICAR test string signature (68-byte payload, known SHA256) and within 60 seconds the same parent process spawns cmd.exe with a dir command. This sequence is used by BlueHammer to probe whether the fetch-placeholder callback fires (indicating the scanner read the file). The same pattern is used by RedSun. A benign process that drops EICAR and then runs dir in the same directory is not expected in production.
query:
sequence by process.entity_id with maxspan=60s
  [file where file.size == 68 and file.extension in ("txt", "com", "exe") and not process.executable : ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")]
  [process where process.name : "cmd.exe" and process.args : ("dir", "/c")]
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: BlueHammer - Full Three-Stage Kill-Chain Sequence (cldapi + EICAR + ktmw32)
description: Highest-confidence BlueHammer detection: sequence correlation requiring all three stage behaviors from the same host entity within 10 minutes. Stage 1: cldapi.dll load by non-vendor process. Stage 2: small file (<=68 bytes) creation by same or child process. Stage 3: ktmw32.dll load by non-installer process. All three conditions together have an extremely low false-positive rate. This rule should page on-call immediately.
query:
sequence by host.id with maxspan=10m
  [library where dll.name : "cldapi.dll" and not process.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft OneDrive\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*")]
  [file where file.size <= 68 and not process.executable : ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")]
  [library where dll.name : "ktmw32.dll" and not process.name : ("msiexec.exe", "dism.exe", "TiWorker.exe", "TrustedInstaller.exe")]
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator
